title: KINGLAKE 1mm Galvanised Garden Wire, 35 Meters Plant Twist Tie for Training Climbing Plants, Crafts, Modelling, Sculpting, Florist
features: 【Dimension】1mm thin diameter, total length 35m (115 feet), having wire is essential when you have a garden, orchard or even a balcony. A staple for any handyman in any toolbox.

【Premium Meterial】 Garden wire is made of steel wire core with galvanized coating, which gives it extra protection against oxidatio, enough sturdy without being too hard, it can be squeezed and cut without problems with the pliers.
【Garden Wire】 Twist wire is ideal for fixing plants to trellis, stakes, or other plant supports, actting as an anchor wire, or using with vine eyes for training climbers up against a wall or fence.
【Craft Handmade】Thin wire can be used for many DIY purposes and projects, such as crafts making, floral arrangements, sculpting, making model and armature, etc.

【Versatile Wire】The use of wire is very wide, you can use it whether in the garden, DIY, home etc, such as, making Christmas decorations, hanging stuff, string solar lights, repairing or putting up fences, repairs, etc
description: Dimension: 1mm thin diameter, 35 meters length (115 feet) Premium meterial: Garden wire is made of steel wire core with Galvanized coating, rustproof and easy to twist, you can cut any length and shape as you want. Garden Wire: Twist tie is ideal for fixing plants to trellis, stakes, or other plant supports, and training plants across a wall, fence etc. DIY Handmade: Thin wire can be used for DIY crafts making, floral arrangements, model making, etc. Versatile Wire: Wire tie can be also used for making or hanging Christmas decorations, hang stuff, repairing or putting up fences, repairs, string solar lights, etc.
